name: How to Calculate Product Carbon Footprint with Climate Seal AI
description: Step-by-step guide to calculate audit-ready Product Carbon Footprint (PCF) using Climate Seal's AI platform in under 4 hours

step.name: Upload Your Bill of Materials
step.text: Upload your product's Bill of Materials (BOM) in Excel or CSV format. Include material quantities, suppliers, and specifications.

step.name: AI Auto-Mapping
step.text: Climate Seal AI automatically maps your materials to emission factors from our comprehensive database, including Ecoinvent, GaBi, and industry-specific datasets.

step.name: Add Energy & Transportation Data
step.text: Input your manufacturing energy consumption and transportation data. The AI will automatically calculate Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions.

step.name: Review & Validate Results
step.text: Review the AI-generated PCF results, validate against ISO 14067 standards, and make any necessary adjustments.

step.name: Export Audit-Ready Reports
step.text: Export your PCF report in multiple formats: ISO 14067 compliance report, GHG Protocol format, or custom buyer requirements.

yield: Audit-ready Product Carbon Footprint report compliant with ISO 14067 and GHG Protocol standards
